summary: Tested new features for iteration 64: Social Media file upload, WhatsApp message delete/media endpoints, Staff Portal pagination. All 17 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified through code review - all requested features are implemented correctly. Automated UI testing blocked by CAPTCHA/OTP verification.

issues: CAPTCHA challenge blocks automated UI testing - manual verification required

critical_code_review_comments: Social Media Manager file upload UI is complete with drag-drop zone, file validation, upload progress, and preview
WhatsApp Inbox delete features implemented: single message delete (hover button), bulk selection mode with checkboxes, clear conversation with confirmation dialog
WhatsApp Inbox media attachment implemented: file picker button, file type validation, preview for images, caption input, 24h window restriction enforced
Staff Portal NEW badge implemented for recently assigned leads (within 2 hours or unseen)
Staff Portal auto-sync toggle with data-testid='auto-sync-toggle' - syncs every 30 seconds when enabled
Staff Portal pagination controls appear when leads exceed 150 per page with First/Prev/Page Numbers/Next/Last buttons
All backend APIs properly validate inputs and return appropriate error messages

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - CAPTCHA blocked automated UI testing

test_credentials.staff_login: ASR1024 (now uses Email+OTP or Mobile OTP)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested via backend APIs. Frontend components verified through code review. Key data-testids: 'auto-sync-toggle' (Staff Portal), 'select-messages-btn' (WhatsApp bulk select), 'clear-conversation-btn' (WhatsApp clear), 'attach-media-btn' (WhatsApp media), 'send-media-btn' (WhatsApp send media). Staff Portal login now requires Email+OTP or Mobile OTP instead of Staff ID/Password.

backend_apis.POST /api/social/upload/media: PASS - File upload endpoint validates file types, rejects invalid types, accepts valid images
backend_apis.POST /api/whatsapp/messages/bulk-delete: PASS - Validates message_ids required, handles non-existent IDs gracefully
backend_apis.DELETE /api/whatsapp/conversations/{phon: PASS - Clears all messages for a phone number
backend_apis.DELETE /api/whatsapp/conversations/old: PASS - Deletes messages older than specified days
backend_apis.POST /api/whatsapp/conversations/{phone}: PASS - Validates media_url required, enforces 24h window, requires incoming message first
backend_apis.GET /api/social/dashboard/stats: PASS - Returns stats with connection status

frontend_components_verified.SocialMediaManager.js - File Upload: VERIFIED - Lines 139-194: handleFileUpload function with validation, FormData upload, preview state
frontend_components_verified.SocialMediaManager.js - Upload UI: VERIFIED - Lines 283-318: Drag-drop zone with upload progress, file preview, click to replace
frontend_components_verified.WhatsAppInbox.js - Delete Button: VERIFIED - Lines 164-171: Delete button on hover for each message bubble
frontend_components_verified.WhatsAppInbox.js - Bulk Selection: VERIFIED - Lines 148-156: Selection mode with checkboxes, Lines 501-530: bulk delete handler
frontend_components_verified.WhatsAppInbox.js - Clear Conversation: VERIFIED - Lines 534-548: Clear conversation handler with confirmation dialog (Lines 849-868)
frontend_components_verified.WhatsAppInbox.js - Media Attachment: VERIFIED - Lines 947-967: Media button with file input, Lines 553-583: file validation
frontend_components_verified.WhatsAppInbox.js - Media Preview: VERIFIED - Lines 970-1029: Preview panel with image preview, caption input, send button
frontend_components_verified.WhatsAppInbox.js - 24h Restriction: VERIFIED - Lines 596-599: 24h window check before sending media
frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - NEW Badge: VERIFIED - Lines 908-912: NEW badge with gradient styling and pulse animation
frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - Auto-Sync Toggle: VERIFIED - Lines 572-578: Toggle button with data-testid='auto-sync-toggle'
frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - Pagination: VERIFIED - Lines 1107-1169: Full pagination controls with First/Prev/Page Numbers/Next/Last

mocked_apis_note: None - all APIs use real Meta WhatsApp Cloud API and Facebook Graph API. File upload uses object storage. WhatsApp media sending will fail without valid API credentials - this is expected.
